title: Zero In 60-Day Adjustable Diffuser, Natural Citronella, Mosquito Repeller, Indoor and Outdoor Use, Bee Safe, Travel Size, White
features: CITRONELLA FRAGRANCE: Made with natural citronella oil to keep mosquitoes and biting insects at bay for up to 60 days, and add the scent of summer to your home environment
BEE SAFE: A Bee Safe product that will not harm bees and other important pollinating insects
MODERN: Attractive and easily adjustable screwcap design
SLOW-RELEASE: Easy-to-use, simply twist to open and close. Will treat an area up to 40 cubic metres when fully opened
TRAVEL SIZE: Portable, adjustable insect control diffuser with citronella fragrance for use at home and abroad for holiday travel
INDOORS AND OUT: Effective insect control around the home or conservatory, as well as on patios, porches, terraces, and balconies in gardens. Ideal for offices, caravans, bathrooms, and holiday homes
description: From the manufacturer 60-Day Adjustable Diffuser 90-Day Knockdown Flying Insect Killer Knockdown Plug In Mosquito Killer Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 3.8 out of 5 stars 4,758 3.4 out of 5 stars 2,363 4.1 out of 5 stars 3,091 Description Made with citronella oil to keep mosquitoes and biting insects at bay for up to 60 days. The attractive diffuser is portable making it ideal for holiday travel. Provides up to 90 days of continuous, slow-release insect control, safeguarding indoor spaces of up to 30 cubic metres from flying pests. Provide continuous protection for your family against mosquitoes, midges, and other biting insects day and night. The discreet plug-in diffuser lasts up to 45 days - ideal for home, caravan and holiday travel. Suitable for Indoor & outdoor Indoor Indoor Format Diffuser Diffuser Plug-in diffuser Reusable no data no data ✓ Easy to Use Simply twist to open and close. Will treat an area up to 40 cubic metres when fully opened. Remove the unit from the foil pack and set the time indicator for 3 months. Place it in a room up to 30m³, avoiding direct heat and strong drafts for best results. Discreet plug-in unit provides whole-room protection. Adaptor required for non-UK sockets.
